headline: Cultural leaders rally to save French heritage under threat
subtitle: The launch of a heritage pass, the search for sponsors and the commitment of volunteers all point to the same effort: those working to preserve France's heritage sites are looking for new ways to avoid a looming funding gap.

headline: Martin Margiela puts 200 pieces from his personal archives up for sale
subtitle: On July 9 in Paris, personal items and prototypes from the famously secretive designer will be auctioned. By personally initiating and organizing the sale, Martin Margiela, who left the fashion world in 2008, is offering a glimpse into his creative process. It is a radical gesture that mirrors his artistic journey.

headline: Sleeping in a cellar, waiting at a funeral home, riding the tram: How the French are improvising to survive the heatwave
